text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Three years of challenges with Air Groove are
coming to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has reigned supreme as the Empress and left
a worthy legacy. She is a beacon that all
Umamusume seek to surpass.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Air Groove refuses to simply sit back
and wait for new challengers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wishes to continue her reign as a challenger
herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the days go by, many choose to follow in her
dauntless footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runners are moving from the fourth corner
into the final stretch! Will Mejiro Dober manage
to take the lead?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is coming in fast! Oh, and they're
neck and neck!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's coming in from the inside! Look at
her go! And she's done it! Mejiro Dober's crossed
the finish!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Magnificent.

text_block_list.name: Female Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Mejiro Dober! What an
incredible race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you. But I'm not satisfied with just this win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I have a goal... An ideal I wish to surpass.

text_block_list.name: Female Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
An ideal, you say! By which, of course, you
mean...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I intend... to challenge Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...At the Queen Elizabeth II Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text:
Is this for real?! The old guard and the new taking
each other on?!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my goodness! I don't know who I should cheer
for!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's right, Dober... Rise up and face me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Of course. Nothing could make me happier.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally come when Dober is prepared
to challenge me, just as she said she would

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Air Groove and I take the long
way back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we walk, we discuss the path we've trekked
thus far.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, Air Groove and I don't talk
about the past very much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reason is simple, really. She's someone who
always has her sights set on what lies ahead.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's not just Dober. Many Umamusume are training
hard for the day on which they can take me on.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I must continue my reign as Empress so that I can
continue to usher them forward.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And you... You are an indispensable part of that
plan, Trainer.
choice_data_list: I'm with you all the way.
I'm with you all the way.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh... That's what I wanted to hear.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now then, let me ask you again.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: How do you perceive me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The answer is clear. I see Air Groove the same
way everyone else does.
choice_data_list: In my eyes, you are the ideal Empress.
In my eyes, you are the ideal Empress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And that's not all...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Then I shall pour every last drop of my energy
into remaining your ideal Empress.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: After all...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You're my ideal trainer.
